calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for Tinniziee Yarnway (Personal Representative)

The Court noted the fees in this matter were extraordinary. Mr. Taylor stated that the Decedent had several jobs with nice corporations, and the corporations were uncooperative in releasing any information to the step-mother until his office threatened subpoenas. Mr. Taylor also stated that he did work at his hourly rate of $300.00, and is not against reducing his hourly rate to $200.00 or $100.00. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
